rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed in component implementation scopes for implementation-level bindings.
Assumptions and guarantees referencing component ports must be in valid component type scopes.
generic_rules: Use only visible identifiers from the AADL model in AGREE contracts.
Place output dependency guarantees in component type annexes when relating visible outputs to inputs.
Avoid using implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Stateful equations should use initialized temporal recurrence like `0.0 -> pre(t) + step`.
anti_patterns: Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type annexes unless represented through valid variables.
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers not present in the analyzed model.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
